programme.title: Hyundai Cup 2026 : Group Stage : Cambodia vs Singapore
programme.desc: Hyundai Cup 2026 is the 16th ASEAN Championship, the biennial international men's football championship of Southeast Asia organised by the ASEAN Football Federation (AFF) and will be the 1st edition under the name ASEAN Hyundai Cup. The tournament will celebrate as the 30th anniversary of the competition. The event will start on 24 July till 26 August 2026. Vietnam are the defending champions after winning the 2024 final against Thailand. Catch the heated tournaments where 10 qualified teams are split into two groups of five and play a round robin system, with each team playing four fixtures. The format of the knockout round remains unchanged, with semi-finals and the final played on two-leg format.

programme.title: The Night Porter
programme.desc: A concentration camp survivor rekindles her sadomasochistic relationship with an ex-SS officer working as a night porter at a Vienna hotel, but his former associates begin stalking them.

programme.title: Violent City
programme.desc: After being double-crossed by his mistress and barely escaping a murder attempt, a hit-man sets out to take his revenge on the woman and the mob boss who put her up to it.

programme.title: The Mad Bomber
programme.desc: William Dorn decides to get back at all the people he blames for the overdose death of his daughter and the break up of his marriage, so he decides to go on a bombing spree.

programme.title: The Night Porter
programme.desc: A concentration camp survivor rekindles her sadomasochistic relationship with an ex-SS officer working as a night porter at a Vienna hotel, but his former associates begin stalking them.

programme.title: Puyah & Putat
programme.desc: Kisah pengembaraan Puyah, seorang gadis kampung becok yang disukai ramai, apabila dia melawat Kuala Lumpur dan termasuk set filem secara tak sengaja, dan tak semena-mena mula mendapat nama sebagai pelakon.

programme.title: Ting Tong, Love
programme.desc: Bored by his mother's insistence on his getting married, Hairi finally agrees on the condition that he could choose his own soul mate. Does the choice of Hairi meet with his mother's approval?

programme.title: Chomel
programme.desc: After her mother's death, Mimi's family fell apart. One day, Mimi finds Chomel, a cat and brings it home, only for it to cause a series of events that brings her broken family back together again.

programme.title: We’ll be back at 6.00am
programme.desc: We’ll be back at 6.00am

programme.title: My Future Husband
programme.desc: Emily berharap untuk menemui bakal suami dan pada suatu hari muncul seorang lelaki bernama Atta yang mengaku dia adalah suami Emily dari masa hadapan.

programme.title: Perangkap Perkahwinan
programme.desc: Three best friends promised to get married, at the same time when they turn 26 years old. Their perceptions of marriage life begin to change and conflict ensues.

programme.title: Cik Puan Sinderella
programme.desc: This is a lighthearted family drama about a teenage girl who is closely guarded by her mother.

programme.title: Anak Kerak
programme.desc: Husin telah menggunakan ilmu hitam iaitu dengan ‘Anak Kerak' demi untuk mendapatkan kekebalan, kesenangan dan kemewahan hidup di dunia

programme.title: Jatuh Cinta Buta
programme.desc: Telefilem komedi romantik tentang perkenalan singkat di antara Zulin, seorang gadis yang tidak pernah bercinta, dengan Izlan, seorang duda dalam satu 'blind date' yang diaturkan oleh Nadya Ramanshah.

programme.title: Matahari
programme.desc: Fauzi seorang guru yang telah dihantar untuk berkhidmat di Sabah. Di sana dia telah berkenalan dengan seorang novelis yang sedang mengalami masalah ‘writer’s block’ iaitu Yazid.

programme.title: Meniti Cinta Di Starimost
programme.desc: Iman dipaksa berkahwin dengan Qaseh, anak kepada orang gajinya untuk mewarisi harta bapanya. Percutian mereka di Bosnia membuahkan bibit-bibit cinta. Lakonan Iqram Dinzly, Zarina Zainoordin dan Yana Shamsudin.

programme.title: Jula Juli Bintang Putus Cinta
programme.desc: Telemovie sekuel Jula Juli Bintang Cinta kini kembali! Kali ini, Jula dan Juli mengalami konflik percintaan dengan Dani & Izham sehingga mereka memutuskan untuk berpisah dan melarikan diri ke kampung Juli.

programme.title: Kampung Kuala Lambat
programme.desc: Kampung Kuala Lambat bagai mengalami sumpahan apabila lelaki yang berkahwin muda akan mati di hari pernikahan mereka namun kejadian ganjil ini tidak berlaku kepada lelaki yang berusia 60 tahun ke atas.

programme.title: Musnahkan Pelamin Anganku
programme.desc: Mikael yang merupakan seorang wedding planner menerima tawaran besar untuk menjayakan sebuah majlis perkahwinan pelanggannya. Namun majlis perkahwinan tersebut merupakan majlis bekas isterinya.

programme.title: Dua
programme.desc: Kisah Farhan yang kehilangan kembarnya Fahrin dalam satu kemalangan tragis. Dia kemudiannya mengambil-alih kehidupan Fahrin namun terperangkap dalam sebuah cinta tiga segi pula. Lakonan Eusoff Hashim dan Sharifah Sakinah.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP9

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 21
programme.desc: The departure of Leonardo hits Zachary even harder. Just then, he heard a strange beeping sound coming from Leonardo's desk and found a mysterious cube-like device. Leonardo left Zachary a Zetabian puzzle box as a gift. Meanwhile, it's Neela's first day at school and she's already hating it. Turns out she is still upset that Uncle Maxie chose Leonardo to return back to Zetabia instead of her.

programme.title: What On Earth - EP 22

Meanwhile, Neela and Zachary are at Science club assembling a potato and plans to use it to communicate with Leonardo. But to their horror, something went wrong with the communicator and they could not send Leonardo back!

Respect, trust, and understanding can be found in the most surprising places.

Han Rourou, is the beauty of Huaxiang Street. She is every man's dream girl. Love abounds when these men and women cross paths.

programme.title: Focus - EP 17 焦点
programme.desc: Johor's election has changed the political game. Will the momentum carry into Negeri Sembilan—and threaten Malaysia's Unity Government? Why did China order 200 Boeing aircraft despite backing its own jet industry? A closer look at the politics and strategy behind the deal.

programme.title: Makan On Wheels S2 - EP 10 开着餐车趴趴走 2
programme.desc: The 3 hosts visit Setiu to experience planting mangroves and digging for shellfish in the wetlands, learn weaving from locals, and savour authentic Malay cuisine. They then tour a heritage resort to explore its history and restoration, and prepare Hainanese satay to treat the dedicated staff and owners preserving the site.

programme.title: Golden Age Talentime 2026 S2 - EP 4 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: After decades devoted to careers and family, these senior contestants enter a new chapter of life. Golden Age Talentime follows their journey as they rediscover long-held music dreams. The brand-new series will continue the team battle concept, creating a platform with greater diversity and excitement for the seniors to have an equal chance to stay till the end.

programme.title: Chill.Hike.Camping - EP 16 港女野人奇遇记
programme.desc: The four beautiful hosts embark on an exotic adventure to challenge themselves to explore secret places in the mountains and seas of New Zealand. They climb the sacred volcano of the indigenous Maori people, set foot on the pure ice soil of the highest mountain range, canoe across the mysterious canyon and also look for dolphins.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 268
programme.desc: Enjoy the smooth taste of Karihome Gold Adult Goat Milk Powder, made with easy-to-digest goat milk proteins and enriched with lutein, collagen, and Omega-3. It supports eye, joint, and heart health, boosts calcium intake, and strengthens immunity. Perfect for the whole family, especially seniors, to maintain bone health and vitality with just two cups a day.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 308
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 296
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 253
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 303
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 241
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body's immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism.

programme.title: Kampung Foodsteps S2: Heritage Edition - EP 5 脚踏食地之时光印迹
programme.desc: Darren joins KOL Kaka & Henn to explore snacks & historic sites in KL, then create miniature food. The guests confessed their true feelings to each other, which instantly brought tears to Kaka's eyes.

programme.title: Legendary Taste of Sichuan S4 - EP 7 川味 第四季(下)
programme.desc: In Legendary Taste of Sichuan S4, the director, Bin Ge and his team will continue to go deep into the countryside, following the smell of cooking, using the camera once again, to interpret the tie or relationship between people and food. In this documentary, we will see how people's life have changed, how food is in tune itself with the human palate, and how people can know or understand the taste story behind every dish.

programme.title: I Believe I Can Fly - EP 1 青春小鸟
programme.desc: Jiayao, Shuntian, Weihao, Guocheng, and Yilong were close friends during high school. Now in middle age, each of them faces different troubles in life, and things haven't been going well for them. At their old classmate Hua Ge's funeral, they decided to place a bet together on Toto, and unexpectedly, they won the grand prize!

programme.title: I Believe I Can Fly - EP 2 青春小鸟
programme.desc: Yilong gets laid off and receives a good severance, but his wife Zhenmei only wants to use it for their child's house. Shuntian, embarrassed by comments about his "old man smell," loses interest in intimacy. Weihao frustrated with his job, decides to quit. When the group learns that Jiayao has vanished to Thailand with their prize money, they decide to go after him!

programme.title: Hyundai Cup 2026 : Group Stage : Myanmar vs Malaysia
programme.desc: Hyundai Cup 2026 is the 16th ASEAN Championship, the biennial international men's football championship of Southeast Asia organised by the ASEAN Football Federation (AFF) and will be the 1st edition under the name ASEAN Hyundai Cup. The tournament will celebrate as the 30th anniversary of the competition. The event will start on 24 July till 26 August 2026. Vietnam are the defending champions after winning the 2024 final against Thailand. Catch the heated tournaments where 10 qualified teams are split into two groups of five and play a round robin system, with each team playing four fixtures. The format of the knockout round remains unchanged, with semi-finals and the final played on two-leg format.

programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy River on his toughest quest yet.

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Titanic
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the sinking on the Amazon of the Sobral Santos.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: River Monsters - Electric Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Brazil in search of a fish that has already killed three cowboys.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates whether the snakehead deserves its fearsome reputation.

programme.title: River Monsters - South Pacific Terrors

programme.title: River Monsters - Vampires of the Deep

programme.title: River Monsters - Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Parana River in Argentina.

programme.title: River Monsters - Rift Valley Killer
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade is on a quest to Africa's Great Rift Valley.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Terminator

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator

programme.title: Violent City
programme.desc: After being double-crossed by his mistress and barely escaping a murder attempt, a hit-man sets out to take his revenge on the woman and the mob boss who put her up to it.

programme.title: The Mad Bomber
programme.desc: William Dorn decides to get back at all the people he blames for the overdose death of his daughter and the break up of his marriage, so he decides to go on a bombing spree.

programme.title: The Night Porter
programme.desc: A concentration camp survivor rekindles her sadomasochistic relationship with an ex-SS officer working as a night porter at a Vienna hotel, but his former associates begin stalking them.

programme.title: White Fang
programme.desc: The wolf dog, aids a reporter, a fur trapper, a nun, a young Eskimo boy and his father in ridding a gold mining town of a sleazy crime lord in 1896 Yukon in Canada.

programme.title: Navajo Joe
programme.desc: The American West in the mid-1800's – a land beyond the reach of the law. A ruthless gang plunders the plains, murdering innocent Indian women and children to collect their scalps. One man stands in their way, a warrior hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Iron Finger
programme.desc: Tough cop Bruce Li arrives back in town in time to investigate a series of odd murders. Victims have two pierce marks on their necks. The killer is an expert in the Iron Finger strike. The fights are fantastic with the two Bruce's and Ku Feng going at it and all are excellent.

programme.title: White Fang
programme.desc: The wolf dog, aids a reporter, a fur trapper, a nun, a young Eskimo boy and his father in ridding a gold mining town of a sleazy crime lord in 1896 Yukon in Canada.

programme.title: Racun Menantu
programme.desc: After marrying Zain, Sara lived in the same house with Pak Dolah, her father-in-law. Because of the family's grudge, Sara started making trouble by seducing her own father-in-law.

programme.title: Cupid
programme.desc: Kisah mengenai seorang ejen yang bekerja di sebuah syarikat penghancur jodoh yang ditugaskan untuk memikat seorang wanita supaya dapat melupakan suaminya yang telah diisytiharkan meninggal dunia. Namun dia jatuh cinta pada wanita tersebut

programme.title: We’ll be back at 6.00am
programme.desc: We’ll be back at 6.00am

programme.title: Luar Biasa
programme.desc: Kisah yang diinspirasikan daripada pemenang pingat emas Paralimpik, Mohamad Ridzuan yang menghadapi penyakit 'Cebral Palsy' dan abangnya yang sentiasa ada di sisinya.

programme.title: Sekolah Api
programme.desc: Api, gangster yang meningkat naik cuba memenuhi amanat arwah neneknya untuk menghabiskan SPM. Dia jatuh cinta dengan guru Bahasa Inggeris dan sanggup melakukan apa saja untuk memenangi hati guru tersebut.

programme.title: Balapan
programme.desc: Kisah empat orang remaja yang telah menjadi musuh sejak sekian lama di lapangan balapan acara pecut 100meter peringkat daerah Selangor dan akhirnya menjadi sahabat seperjuangan.

programme.title: Lampu Merah
programme.desc: Si lelaki sukakan si perempuan, tanpa sedar yang si perempuan itu psiko dan obses dengan cintanya. Cara untuk selamatkan diri hanya dengan jatuh cinta dengan si perempuan semula.

programme.title: Bini Aku Dari...
programme.desc: Lydia dan Rudy telah pun berkahwin. Lydia nak anak walaupun Rudy belum bersedia lagi. Perangai Lydia makin menjadi- jadi apabila mengikut hukum hakam dari kakiberamal.com.

programme.title: Tebus
programme.desc: Anak perempuan Mikail telah di culik dan untuk menyelamatkan anaknya dia cuba mengimbau kembali sejarah lampau dirinya ketika menyertai kumpulan gangster.

programme.title: Survival 486
programme.desc: Syuhada going hiking to Gunung Tahan with her friends. Unfortunately, she got lost and fell into a deep hole and trapped there for 19 days.

programme.title: Cik Paris Diva Kampung
programme.desc: Zulaikha merupakan seroang gadis bandar yang mencabar diri untuk hidup di kampung lalu terpikat dengan jejaka kampung yang berjaya menawan hatinya.

programme.title: Budak Dari Tak Bai
programme.desc: Melalui kehidupan yang getir, Johari meninggalkan Tak Bai pada zaman kanak-kanak ke Kota Bharu. Peristiwa hitam membuatkannya hanyut dalam dunia gelap. Dilakonkan oleh Kamal Adli dan Nabila Huda.

programme.title: Delen
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Delen yang mula rasa terancam apabila Emily mula menyukai pelajar baru bernama Robert. Sejak itu, bermulalah persaingan antara Delen dan Robert demi merebut cinta Emily.

programme.title: Bro Jenin
programme.desc: Kisah Jenin yang telah masuk ke zaman kini. Dia berjumpa dengan seorang animator, Emily. Wujud perbezaan pendapat maka terjadi lah kisah2 lucu dan akhirnya Jenin terpaksa pulang ke tempat asalnya.
